description: A public agency is ready to publish its annual financial report to its website for public access.

nodes.task_description: Compile the final, approved annual report document.

expected_outcome.value: The communications director has the final PDF of the report.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the document is in a web-accessible format (e.g., tagged PDF).

expected_outcome.value: The director confirms the PDF meets accessibility standards.

nodes.task_description: Upload and publish the report to the agency's public website.

expected_outcome.value: The director successfully posts the report online.
